types.label: Cloud-hosted model
types.description: A provider-routed model that uses an online model endpoint without storing credentials in public files.

types.label: Local GGUF model
types.description: A local runtime track for GGUF or compatible model references.

types.label: Manual external model
types.description: A copy/paste workflow for external model tools where direct automation is unavailable.

types.label: Fine-tuned provider model
types.description: A future provider-tuned route with dataset and training provenance tracking.

types.label: Retrieval-augmented model
types.description: A model route shaped by profile-linked retrieval sources and readiness records.

types.label: Future owned/foundation model
types.description: A future company-owned infrastructure track, not claimed as available in the current website runtime.

types.label: Scratch/from-zero research model
types.description: A planning and requirements track for future research compute, datasets, and architecture decisions.
